scope: Compact reviewed internals for the MoonCatSVGs on-chain SVG materialization contract. This file documents role, source provenance, dependencies, public rendering surfaces, and limitations without importing Solidity source, ABI JSON, coordinate constants, generated SVG output, or per-cat outputs.

officialContext.notes: The MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log links MoonCatSVGs as one of the official on-chain materialization contracts.

role.summary: On-chain SVG image-generation contract for base MoonCat appearance.
sourceConfirmed: The verified source title and notice describe MoonCatSVGs as on-chain MoonCat image generation that builds SVGs of MoonCat images.
imageOf returns string SVG output for bytes5 cat IDs or rescue-order inputs.
The contract assembles SVG pixel/shape groups from trait and color inputs.
notIncluded: Accessory image composition is not handled in this review; MoonCatAccessoryImages is a separate contract surface.
Generated SVG strings, per-cat outputs, coordinate arrays, pattern arrays, and full Solidity source are not imported.

dependencies.name: MoonCatRescue
sourceConfirmedUse: rescueOrder(uint256) converts rescue-order inputs to bytes5 cat IDs.
catOwners(bytes5) is compared with the Acclimated contract address to choose default glow behavior for bytes5 imageOf(catId).

dependencies.name: MoonCatReference
sourceConfirmedUse: setReferenceContract(address) can update the reference contract through owner-only administration.

dependencies.name: MoonCatTraits
sourceConfirmedUse: imageOf(bytes5,bool) calls kTraitsOf(catId) and uses facing, expression, pattern, and pose for SVG assembly.

dependencies.name: MoonCatColors
sourceConfirmedUse: imageOf(bytes5,bool) calls colorsOf(catId) to obtain uint8[24] color data.
If glow is enabled, colors[0], colors[1], and colors[2] are used as the glow RGB inputs.

dependencies.name: MoonCatAcclimatorAddress
sourceConfirmedUse: The no-explicit-glow bytes5 imageOf(catId) overload treats a cat as glowing when MoonCatRescue.catOwners(catId) equals the stored Acclimated contract address.

imageOf.behavior: Builds SVG output for a bytes5 cat ID with caller-specified glow.
Builds SVG output for a bytes5 cat ID and derives glow by checking whether the original owner is the stored Acclimated contract address.
Requires rescueOrder < 25440, converts rescue order through MoonCatRescue.rescueOrder(rescueOrder), then builds SVG output with caller-specified glow.
Requires rescueOrder < 25440, converts rescue order through MoonCatRescue.rescueOrder(rescueOrder), then uses the default bytes5 glow behavior.

renderingFlow: imageOf(bytes5,bool) obtains facing, expression, pattern, and pose from MoonCatTraits.kTraitsOf(catId).
imageOf(bytes5,bool) obtains uint8[24] colors from MoonCatColors.colorsOf(catId).
getPixelData(facing, expression, pose, pattern, colors) builds the base SVG pixel data.
When glow is true, glowGroup wraps or augments the pixel data using the first RGB triple from colorsOf.
boundingBox(facing, pose) derives the viewBox dimensions from CatBox and adjusts x for facing == 1.
svgTag(x, y, width, height), pixel data, and the closing svg tag are concatenated into the returned string.

outputFormat.sourceConfirmed: imageOf returns a string assembled from an opening SVG tag, generated pixel data, and a closing </svg> tag.
svgTagProperties: width and height are five times the computed viewBox width and height
defs include a rect with id r, width 2, and height 2
limitations: No generated SVG output is stored.
No exact coordinate, pattern, or polygon data is imported.
No claim is made that a rendered output has been independently reproduced from this KB file.

conceptualStorageAndConstants: Stores interface references for MoonCatReference, MoonCatTraits, and MoonCatColors.
Uses a fixed MoonCatRescue address and a fixed Acclimated contract address.
Contains compact public arrays and strings for base MoonCat geometry and pattern assembly, including CatBox, Face, Border, Coat, Tummy, Skin, Whiskers, Eyes, and Patterns.
CatBox is used by boundingBox to derive SVG viewBox dimensions.
limitations: This is not a full ABI, full Solidity source, bytecode, constructor-argument, storage-layout, or generated-output import.
This file does not include coordinate constants, pattern arrays, polygon strings, per-cat SVGs, generated images, or per-cat materialization outputs.
This review covers base MoonCat SVG assembly only; accessory PNG/image composition remains in MoonCatAccessoryImages and needs a separate internals pass before stronger accessory claims.
Trait derivation and exact trait mappings remain owned by MoonCatTraits and the separate trait data strategy; they are not derived here.
Color derivation and exact palette values remain owned by MoonCatColors and color files; this file only records how MoonCatSVGs consumes colorsOf output.
No current ownership or current chain-state claim is made beyond the source-confirmed catOwners check used for default glow behavior.
